grading.condition_summary: Baby monitor in good working condition with minor cosmetic scratches on the camera housing.

triage.reasoning: Good condition electronics with clear buyer market — direct resell maximises recovery at minimal logistics cost.
triage.cost_benefit_summary: Resell → Estimated recovery ₹1,400 | CO₂ saved: 2.1kg | Green Credits: +45

pricing.reasoning: Electronics depreciate ~55% in 2 years; Good condition commands upper-mid range.

passport_narrative.narrative: This baby monitor has had two careful owners over 20 months. Both graded it Good at handoff — the most recent AI inspection found no functional defects and only minor cosmetic marks on the housing.

main_issues: Could add more close-up photos of defects
listing_quality.top_fix: Add a photo clearly showing the scratch mentioned in defects to set buyer expectations and reduce returns.

grading.condition_summary: Running shoes show visible sole wear and minor scuffing — suitable for casual use, not intense training.

triage.reasoning: Fair condition shoes still have market value for casual buyers — resell avoids landfill at low logistics cost.
triage.cost_benefit_summary: Resell → Estimated recovery ₹400 | CO₂ saved: 1.4kg | Green Credits: +20

pricing.reasoning: Fashion shoes in Fair condition depreciate 65–75%; casual buyer market sets price.

passport_narrative.narrative: These Nike running shoes have been used regularly by one owner for about 15 months. The AI inspection confirms visible but non-structural sole wear — ideal for everyday casual use at a great price.

main_issues: Return rate for this category is high (38%)
Missing photo of sole wear clearly
listing_quality.top_fix: Add a size comparison chart — 38% of returns for running shoes are due to sizing, and a chart can prevent ~12 returns per month.

grading.condition_summary: Wired earphones in good working condition with minor cable wear near the 3.5mm jack.
defects_detected: minor cable insulation wear near 3.5mm jack

triage.reasoning: Working electronics in Good condition have clear demand on local peer-to-peer — logistics-free resell maximises value.
triage.cost_benefit_summary: Resell → Estimated recovery ₹900 | CO₂ saved: 1.2kg | Green Credits: +30

pricing.reasoning: Audio accessories retain 35–40% value in Good condition after 2 years.

passport_narrative.narrative: These boAt earphones have served one owner well for 2 years with only minor wear near the jack. All audio functions work perfectly — a solid buy for anyone wanting quality audio without the new price tag.

main_issues: Could include audio test note in description
listing_quality.top_fix: Add a close-up photo of the cable condition to transparently address the defect and reduce return likelihood.

grading.condition_summary: WiFi router fully functional with cosmetic yellowing on the casing — common for older routers.

triage.reasoning: Functional networking equipment has strong demand from budget buyers — resell at ₹700 is fair for this age and condition.
triage.cost_benefit_summary: Resell → Estimated recovery ₹700 | CO₂ saved: 1.6kg | Green Credits: +25

pricing.reasoning: Networking gear depreciates heavily after 4 years; Good function saves the price.

passport_narrative.narrative: This TP-Link router has reliably served one household for over 4 years with no resets needed. The only cosmetic change is casing yellowing — the networking performance remains solid for single-room coverage.

listing_quality.top_fix: Add ISP compatibility details — 41% of this router's returns are due to ISP incompatibility, which a simple note can prevent.

grading.condition_summary: Android tablet with great screen condition, 89% battery health, and minor back scratches.

triage.reasoning: Tablets in Good condition with strong battery health command premium in peer-to-peer market versus refurb cost.
triage.cost_benefit_summary: Resell → Estimated recovery ₹6,500 | CO₂ saved: 4.8kg | Green Credits: +80

pricing.reasoning: Tablets retain value well; 89% battery and good screen justify 43% of original price.

passport_narrative.narrative: This Samsung tablet has been carefully maintained by one owner for nearly 4 years, retaining 89% battery health and a pristine screen. Only minor back cosmetic marks — functionally it performs like near-new.

main_issues: Battery health stat should be in description
listing_quality.top_fix: Prominently display the 89% battery health — tablet buyers consider battery a key factor and this will differentiate your listing.

grading.condition_summary: Baby stroller in good condition with smooth folding mechanism and clean fabric — minor rust on wheel axles.

triage.reasoning: Baby gear in Good condition has high local demand and zero need for logistics — peer-to-peer resell is optimal.
triage.cost_benefit_summary: Resell → Estimated recovery ₹3,200 | CO₂ saved: 3.5kg | Green Credits: +65

pricing.reasoning: Baby strollers depreciate 50–60% over 3 years; Good condition with working mechanism commands mid-range.

passport_narrative.narrative: This stroller served one family faithfully through 18 months of city use. The folding mechanism works smoothly and the fabric is clean — a trusted choice for growing families who value quality over new-at-any-price.

main_issues: Rust on axles should be shown clearly
listing_quality.top_fix: Add a short photo or note confirming the wheels still roll smoothly despite the axle rust — buyers of baby gear prioritise safety confirmation.

grading.condition_summary: Baby monitor with working night vision and screen — small scratch on the side bezel only.

triage.reasoning: Good condition baby monitor with night vision intact — high local demand from new parents makes resell optimal.
triage.cost_benefit_summary: Resell → Estimated recovery ₹1,100 | CO₂ saved: 1.9kg | Green Credits: +38

pricing.reasoning: Baby monitors lose ~60% value in 2–3 years; Good working condition holds the mid-range.

passport_narrative.narrative: This Motorola baby monitor has been used by one careful owner for 2 years and retains all core functions including night vision. The only cosmetic issue is a small side-bezel scratch that doesn't affect use.

listing_quality.top_fix: Add a night vision capture to the photos — baby monitor buyers specifically check this feature and it reduces returns by ~7%.

grading.condition_summary: Handwoven jute tote in pristine condition — freshly crafted by local artisan.

triage.reasoning: Brand new artisan product with full value — direct resell at asking price is the only logical option.
triage.cost_benefit_summary: Resell → Estimated recovery ₹450 | CO₂ saved: 0.8kg (vs synthetic bag) | Green Credits: +35

pricing.reasoning: New artisan product; asking price matches market for handwoven jute bags.

passport_narrative.narrative: This jute tote is a first-sale artisan piece, handwoven with zero synthetic materials. Buying it directly supports a local maker and eliminates shipping carbon entirely — a better choice by every measure.

listing_quality.top_fix: Add a photo of the weave texture and handle stitching to command premium pricing.

grading.condition_summary: Mixer grinder with strong motor — one small jar has a hairline crack, other jars in perfect condition.

triage.reasoning: Appliances with working motors command strong local resale; cracked jar is cosmetic and common.
triage.cost_benefit_summary: Resell → Estimated recovery ₹900 | CO₂ saved: 2.8kg | Green Credits: +35

pricing.reasoning: Kitchen appliances depreciate ~60% over 4 years; working motor holds value despite cracked jar.

passport_narrative.narrative: This Bajaj mixer has powered 4 years of kitchen use with a still-strong 750W motor. One small jar has a hairline crack but the other two jars are perfect — excellent value for everyday cooking at a fraction of new price.

listing_quality.top_fix: Add a clear photo of the cracked jar — transparent disclosure builds trust and prevents returns.

clusters.suggested_fix: Add detailed measurements (chest, length, waist) to every fashion listing — not just size labels.
Add at least one unedited natural-light photo and list every defect in bullet points — even minor ones.
Include battery health percentage for electronics and a usage demo note for appliances.
List compatible models/standards (e.g., ISP type, OS version, connector type) in every electronic listing.
Explicitly list what IS and IS NOT included — buyers assume everything is included unless told otherwise.
